results.title: Brachytherapy in primary ocular tumors.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 9143054. 1997/05/01 00:00. PURPOSE: The purpose of this guideline is to present evidence-based consensus 
recommendations for low dose rate (LDR) permanent seed brachytherapy for the 
primary treatment of prostate cancer.
METHODS AND MATERIALS: The American Brachytherapy Society convened a task force 
for addressing key questions concerning ultrasound-based LDR prostate 
brachytherapy for the primary treatment of prostate cancer. A comprehensive
